props.message:
THE SERVERY

The kitchen of the realm. Always cooking. Always feeding. The hearth has not gone out in living memory.

5 PEBBLES — FULL MEAL

Pinned by the pass:

'Today: hot stew, hearthbread, and whatever the runners bring back from the gardens. The Servery feeds whoever asks. The Servery has never not fed whoever asked.'

root.speaker: Head Cook Belna
root.text:
Walker! Sit, sit. You're three shades pale. When did you last eat a hot meal?

Five pebbles. Full bowl. Bread on the side. Hearth's hot.

meal.speaker: Head Cook Belna
meal.text:
Right then. *she ladles a bowl deep enough to drown a thought in.*

Mind the steam. Eat slow. The Servery isn't going anywhere — neither should you, for a moment.

*you feel warmer just from sitting at her counter. Walk well.*

looking.speaker: Head Cook Belna
looking.text: Suit yourself. The pot's here when you change your mind. Hearthbread's coming out in a breath if you can wait.

bye.speaker: Head Cook Belna
bye.text: Walk well. Eat better. Come back hungry.

root.speaker: Runner Jenn
root.text:
Hey hey, walker — mind your toes, hot pot coming through!

*she balances three bowls and a kettle without spilling.*

Belna says we feed the realm. So we feed the realm.

bye.speaker: Runner Jenn
bye.text: Walk well! Out of the way of the kettle, walk well!

root.speaker: Runner Sef
root.text:
Two more bowls and I can sit down. Maybe.

If you see a walker who looks like they haven't eaten — drag them in here. Belna won't take no for an answer.

root.speaker: Visiting Bind
root.text:
Five pebbles for this? Down at the Sprawl I'd get three pebbles' worth and a complaint card.

*he eats anyway. The bowl is empty inside a minute.*

By the Source, that was a good stew. Don't tell Belna I said so.

bye.speaker: Visiting Bind
bye.text: Walk well. Tell Belna the pepper was uneven. Don't tell her it wasn't.

props.message:
Posted on the kitchen door of the Servery:

    tux@servery $ make sandwich
    Permission denied.

    tux@servery $ sudo make sandwich
    Okay.

Posted at the Servery's front gate:

    It works!

If you are reading this, the Servery has been raised correctly.
You may now serve content as you see fit.
If you did not raise this Servery, the keeper would like a word.
